Administrative assistance office

Making your formalities a success

Residence permit, naturalisation, family reunification, work authorisation: we guide you at every step, with rigour, transparency and confidentiality.

Book an appointment Our services
Experience
+10 ans
Cases handled
+2 500
Satisfaction
98%

Who we are

A firm dedicated to foreigners in France

For over ten years, we have been supporting individuals and families in regularising and managing their administrative status in France. We master prefectural procedures and fight for every file.

Learn more

Our expertise

Services tailored to every situation

Whether you are an employee, student, spouse of a French citizen or applying for naturalisation, we handle your file from start to finish.

Residence permit

Full preparation and follow-up of your residence permit application, from booking the prefecture appointment to receiving the permit.

Learn more

Residence permit renewal

Anticipating deadlines, checking documents and guiding you through to the renewal of your permit.

Learn more

Work authorisation

Preparing the employer file and handling procedures with DREETS to obtain your work authorisation.

Learn more

Naturalisation

Assessing your eligibility, preparing supporting documents and guiding you through to the naturalisation decree.

Learn more

Family reunification

Full family reunification procedure: conditions, OFII submission and file follow-up until your relatives arrive.

Learn more

Personalised support

Tailored advice, letter writing, administrative appeals, and daily follow-up of your procedures.

Learn more

Our commitments

Four values that guide our firm

Accompagnement

Un interlocuteur dédié à chaque étape, de l'analyse du dossier à la décision finale.

Transparence

Honoraires clairs, échéances communiquées et reporting régulier sur l'avancement.

Réactivité

Réponse à vos questions sous 24h ouvrées et anticipation des délais administratifs.

Confidentialité

Vos documents et informations personnelles sont traités avec la plus stricte discrétion.

A procedure to start? Let's talk.

First consultation is confidential and free of charge. We assess your situation and propose a clear action plan.

Book an appointment

"Faire de vos démarches un succès"
